subcodes.first_line: Thy letter hath reached the Divine Throne and hath been graced with the glances of loving-kindness, and that which was inscribed therein hath found acceptance. Blessed art thou [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: کتابت لدی العرش حاضر و بلحاظ عنایت فائز و آنچه مسطور مقبول افتاد نعیما لک بما
subcodes.subjects: @service to others; to the Cause of God, @acknowledgment of gift; of monetary contribution, @consolation and comfort, @call to action
